# Internet fixtures

These test fixtures were downloaded from public web sources and are used to
exercise the CLI attachment paths with real files.

- `wikimedia-demo.png`
  - Source: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/47/PNG_transparency_demonstration_1.png
- `w3c-dummy.pdf`
  - Source: https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf
- `pywordform-sample_form.docx`
  - Source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mycr0ft/pywordform/master/sample_form.docx
